# openai_project_service_account (Resource)

Manage a project service account. The API returns an unredacted API key on create, but the Terraform provider does not model or store that key.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "openai_project_service_account" "example" {
  project_id = "proj_123"
  name       = "terraform-managed"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) name
- `project_id` (String) project id

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (Number) created at
- `id` (String) id
- `service_account_id` (String) service account id

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = openai_project_service_account.example
  id = "proj_123/service_account_123"
}
```
